cta.title: Ready to Schedule?
cta.subtitle: New patients welcome — call today or book online

faqs.answer: No referral is needed. You can schedule directly by calling (845) 555-0180 or using our online booking form.
faqs.question: Do I need a referral to see you?

faqs.answer: Most patients benefit from cleanings every 6 months. Patients with gum disease may need cleanings every 3-4 months.
faqs.question: How often should I get a dental cleaning?

faqs.answer: We're in-network with most major PPO dental plans. Call us and we'll verify your benefits before your visit.
faqs.question: Do you accept my insurance?

faqs.answer: We offer nitrous oxide (laughing gas) and oral sedation to help you relax. Our team is trained in gentle, anxiety-free dentistry.
faqs.question: What if I'm nervous about dental work?

hero.title: Our Dental Services
hero.subtitle: Comprehensive care for your entire family — from routine cleanings to advanced restorative treatments

overview.title: Complete Dental Care Under One Roof
benefits: In-network with most major PPO plans
Advanced technology for faster, more precise treatment
overview.introduction: At Alex Dental Clinic, we offer a full range of dental services so you never have to be referred elsewhere. From preventive care to cosmetic transformations to complex restorative work, our team has the training and technology to handle it all — comfortably and affordably.

items.title: Licensed & Accredited
items.description: Board-certified dentists with ongoing continuing education

items.title: Same-Day Care
items.description: Emergency appointments available during office hours

items.title: Flexible Payment
items.description: Insurance accepted, financing available, membership plan offered

categories.name: General Dentistry
categories.subtitle: Prevention & essential care
categories.description: The foundation of a healthy smile. Regular cleanings, exams, and early intervention keep small problems from becoming big ones.

categories.name: Cosmetic Dentistry
categories.subtitle: Whitening, veneers & smile makeovers
categories.description: Transform your smile with professional whitening, porcelain veneers, bonding, and complete smile makeovers designed to give you confidence.

categories.name: Restorative Dentistry
categories.subtitle: Implants, crowns, bridges & dentures
categories.description: Replace missing teeth and restore damaged ones with implants, crowns, bridges, and dentures — using the latest technology for natural-looking, long-lasting results.

categories.name: Orthodontics
categories.subtitle: Clear aligners for a straighter smile
categories.description: Straighten your teeth discreetly with Invisalign clear aligners — no metal braces needed. Custom treatment plans for teens and adults.

categories.name: Children's Dentistry
categories.subtitle: Gentle, fun care for kids
categories.description: Kid-friendly dental care from first tooth through teen years. We make visits fun, comfortable, and educational for your child.

categories.name: Sedation & Comfort
categories.subtitle: Anxiety-free treatment options
categories.description: Nervous about the dentist? We offer nitrous oxide, oral sedation, and a gentle approach so you can relax through any procedure.

items.title: Cleanings & Comprehensive Exams
items.shortDescription: Professional dental cleanings, comprehensive oral exams, and digital X-rays to keep your smile healthy and bright.

items.title: Fillings
items.shortDescription: Tooth-colored composite fillings that restore strength and blend naturally with your smile

items.title: Root Canal Therapy
items.shortDescription: Pain-free root canal treatment to save infected teeth and relieve discomfort

items.title: Tooth Extractions
items.shortDescription: Gentle extractions including wisdom teeth removal with sedation options

items.title: Gum Disease Treatment
items.shortDescription: Deep cleanings and periodontal therapy to restore gum health

items.title: Oral Cancer Screening
items.shortDescription: Early detection screenings included with every comprehensive exam

items.title: Teeth Whitening
items.shortDescription: Professional in-office and take-home whitening for dramatic, lasting results

items.title: Porcelain Veneers
items.shortDescription: Custom porcelain veneers to transform the shape, color, and alignment of your smile

items.title: Dental Bonding
items.shortDescription: Quick, affordable cosmetic bonding to fix chips, gaps, and discoloration

items.title: Smile Makeover
items.shortDescription: Comprehensive cosmetic treatment plans combining multiple procedures for a complete transformation

items.title: Dental Implants
items.shortDescription: Permanent tooth replacement with titanium implants that look, feel, and function like natural teeth

items.title: Crowns & Bridges
items.shortDescription: Custom crowns and bridges to restore damaged or missing teeth — same-day options available

items.title: Dentures
items.shortDescription: Full and partial dentures crafted for comfort, function, and a natural appearance

items.title: Full-Arch Implants
items.shortDescription: All-on-4 and All-on-6 full-arch implant solutions for complete smile restoration

items.title: Invisalign
items.shortDescription: Clear aligner therapy to straighten teeth discreetly — no metal braces needed

items.title: Pediatric Dentistry
items.shortDescription: Gentle, kid-friendly dental care from first tooth through teen years

items.title: Sedation Dentistry
items.shortDescription: Nitrous oxide and oral sedation options so you can relax through any procedure
